body: Hi Maya — I’m reaching out about a three-week lifecycle email sprint for a fintech launch. Your recent campaign work felt like a strong match, and I’d love to compare notes if you’re open to a quick call this week.
Thanks, this sounds interesting. Before we book time, what budget range are you working with?
We’ve got room up to $5,000 for the sprint depending on fit and turnaround. If that’s in range for you, I can send a few call windows today.
That works on my side. I’m usually around $4,800 for something like this, so feel free to send times.
Perfect. I can do Tuesday at 10:00, Tuesday at 14:00, or Wednesday at 11:00. If one of those works, I’ll lock it in right away.
Great — I’ve locked in Tuesday at 14:00 and sent over the hold. Looking forward to meeting you then.
